Information

Frequently Asked Questions

How can I book or change my seat?

You can choose a seat or change your seat assignment for most flights by calling skyroutez customer service and follow the hassle-free process of our industry-experienced agents.

What should I do if I am travelling with my pet?

We at Skyroutez understand that pets are an important part of your life and we try our level best to make sure that your pet has the best travel and hassle-free experience for further info call our customer care number.

Cancel or non-refundable ticket?

If you purchased a ticket, a cancellation fee will be deducted from the original cost of your flight. Any remaining value will be provided as a credit that can be used towards the purchase of another ticket. Service fees apply.

How can I request seat with extra legroom?

We take full care of our customers and guide them through the process of getting the best seat with maximum legroom.

How do I change my flight on the same day?

Change of plans can happen anytime and flights can be changed in a few minutes by contacting our experienced travel agent. Service fees apply.

Check-in times at international airport?

When you’re traveling outside of the United States, we make the suggestion to arrive at least 3 hours prior to your departure. You must be checked in at least 1 hour before your scheduled departure. Additionally, we recommend being at the gate and ready to board 45 minutes before your scheduled departure time.

Disclaimer

Our site may include third-party website links and, we cannot be held liable for its relevancy. The content published on our website is only for reference purposes and cannot be commercialized. We have brought the details after proper research here; however, we cannot guarantee its accuracy.
